hero.title: From Idea to Market Bridging Innovation and Industry
hero.description: We are glad to have you here. Explore our features and services.

introduction.title: Centre for Innovation and Entrepreneurship
introduction.description: The Centre for Innovation and Entrepreneurship (CIE) is a hub for innovation, research, and entrepreneurship at the International University of Rabat. We support researchers, students, and entrepreneurs in developing and commercializing their ideas.

visionAndMission.mission: To foster innovation and entrepreneurship by providing resources, support, and opportunities for researchers, students, and entrepreneurs to develop and commercialize their ideas.
visionAndMission.vision: To be a leading center for innovation and entrepreneurship in Morocco and Africa, driving economic growth and social impact through research commercialization and startup development.

departmentHead.role: Director of the Centre for Innovation and Entrepreneurship
departmentHead.message: Welcome to the Centre for Innovation and Entrepreneurship. We are committed to supporting innovation and entrepreneurship at the International University of Rabat and beyond.

departments.title: Our Departments
departments.subtitle: Discover our specialized departments and their unique offerings

tto.description: Bridging Innovation and Industry through Research Commercialization
